title: Exosomal Non-Coding RNAs in Gastrointestinal Cancer Drug Resistance: A Systematic Review of Emerging Mechanisms and Clinical Implications.
publicationName: Journal of cellular and molecular medicine
journalName: Journal of cellular and molecular medicine
snippet: Gastrointestinal (GI) tumours are one of the most prevalent cancers globally. Even with normal GI function, individuals may develop neoplasms, highlighting the need to better understand the underlying causes of tumorigenesis.
